ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the study was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the study was last modified */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the organism */,
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomy ID of the organism */,
  "organism_description" TEXT /* Description of the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cells" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell or tissue type */,
  "cell_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell or tissue type */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of the cell or tissue (e.g., cell line, tissue) */,
  "cell_description" TEXT /* Description of the cell or tissue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the treatment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the concentration and duration */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library preparation strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the library preparation strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the library preparation strategy */,
  "library_strategy_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the library preparation strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ribosome_types" (
  "ribosome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ribosome type */,
  "ribosome_name" TEXT /* Name of the ribosome type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ribosome type */,
  "ribosome_type_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the ribosome type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ribosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the sample belongs to */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organism used in the sample */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell or tissue type used in the sample */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment applied to the sample */,
  "library_strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library preparation strategy used */,
  "ribosome_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ribosome type used */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., processed, unprocessed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_library_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_strategy_id") REFERENCES library_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_ribosome_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("ribosome_type_id") REFERENCES ribosome_types ("ribosome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_organism_id FOREIGN KEY ("organism_id") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., fastq, bam) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "readme_contents" TEXT /* Contents of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample accessed (if applicable) */,
  "data_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file accessed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_log_data_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_log_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the contributor contributed to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who contributed */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., data collection, data analysis) */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_contributors_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_contributors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata entry (e.g., sequencing date, sequencing instrument) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_metadata_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
